ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the television service provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the provider */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Email address for customer support */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing plan */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider offering the plan */,
  "starting_price" TEXT /* Starting price of the plan */,
  "max_price" TEXT /* Maximum price of the plan */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the pricing */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the pricing plan */,
  "data_limit" INTEGER /* Data limit in GB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_plans_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature set */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing plan */,
  "max_channel_count" TEXT /* Maximum number of channels available in the plan */,
  "simultaneous_dvr_recordings" INTEGER /* Maximum number of simultaneous DVR recordings allowed */,
  "max_streaming_devices" INTEGER /* Maximum number of devices that can stream at the same time */,
  "dvr_storage" INTEGER /* DVR storage capacity in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES pricing_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's mailing address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user setting the preference */,
  "preferred_provider" TEXT /* Preferred television service provider */,
  "preferred_price_range" TEXT /* Preferred price range for plans */,
  "preferred_channel_count" TEXT /* Preferred number of channels */,
  "preferred_features" TEXT /* Other preferred features (e.g., DVR capacity, streaming devices) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the availability record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user checking service availability */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Availability status of the provider in the user's area */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Area covered by the provider (e.g., city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, save preference) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., plan ID, feature set) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotional_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional offer */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing plan associated with the offer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offer */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the offer expires */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotional_offers_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES pricing_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_offerings" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider offering the channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of content (e.g., Sports, News, Entertainment) */,
  "hd_available" INTEGER /* Availability of HD streaming for the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channel_offerings_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user submitting the review */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing plan */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES pricing_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended provider */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended pricing plan */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., matches user preferences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES pricing_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
